steps.title: Identify point values for each game outcome
steps.content:
The problem tells us:
  • Each draw gives 1 point
  • Each win gives 3 points
  • The team has earned 21 total points
  • $d$ = number of draws, $w$ = number of wins

steps.title: Build the equation from total points
steps.content:
Total points come from two sources:
Points from draws: 1 point per draw × $d$ draws = $d$ points
Points from wins: 3 points per win × $w$ wins = $3w$ points

Setting the sum equal to 21 points:
$$d + 3w = 21$$

This matches choice D — D is correct.
